options.name: -diodeCell
options.description: Specifies the name of the diode cell master.

options.name: -loc
options.description: Specifies the location of the lower left corner of the diode.

options.name: -orient
options.description: Specifies orientation of the placed diode.

options.name: -pin
options.description: Specifies the pin associated with the diode.

options.name: -prefix
options.description: Specifies the prefix name of the diode cell instances.
